title: Hyper! ඞ
description: Cursed and complicated tech 'n' magic mod.
body:
![asphodel! a gray dimension with spires on the right and an open plain on the left. the middle is filled with a grayish blue liquid river](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83dcb1e18fd3128d664a7ddb9a972f67b236f39d.png)
# Welcome to HYPER!
## It's a tech mod! It's a magic mod! ~~It's a kitchen sink pack without any of the organization/optimization/coherence!~~


### There's automation! There's weapons of mass destruction! We even have a nuclear bomb on a stick that deletes entire chunks!
Hell, there are like four competing magic systems you gotta use just to make the nuclear reactor. (Yes, there's a nuclear reactor. No, it doesn't make energy, it's for mining).

Here's a list of just _some_ of the stuff in store:
- ~~SIX~~ ~~**_SEVEN_**~~ eight or nine sets of gear usable across the 
- multiple dimensions full of new building blocks and loot. (but mostly building blocks)
- A sword that deletes the organs of whatever you hit
- Material generation, acquisition, processing, and crafting. (All with mostly functional machinery!)
- Gambling. So, so, _so_ much gambling. It's necessary for progression in multiple stages! Probably too much gambling if I'm being real.
- Far too many decorative blocks for all your block-vomit needs :o

Anyways, download HYPER! today and enjoy the catastrophe.
(pls report glitches on the github i suck at coding :sob:)
